hooks.name: Test changed components after push
hooks.description: After a git push, identify which frontend pages were modified in the commit and run only those specific tests.

action.prompt: A git push just happened. Check which files changed in the last commit with `git diff --name-only HEAD~1`. If any frontend page components (frontend/src/app/*/page.tsx) or test files (frontend/e2e/*.spec.ts) were modified, run ONLY the corresponding Playwright tests for those pages. Map: /brainâ†’brain.spec.ts, /createâ†’create.spec.ts, /talentâ†’talent.spec.ts, /assetsâ†’assets.spec.ts, /modelsâ†’models.spec.ts, /adminâ†’admin.spec.ts, /trainingâ†’training.spec.ts, /settingsâ†’settings.spec.ts, /productionâ†’production.spec.ts, /publishâ†’publish.spec.ts, /analyticsâ†’analytics.spec.ts, /editorâ†’editor.spec.ts, /workflowsâ†’workflows.spec.ts, /admin/fleetâ†’fleet.spec.ts. Run: `cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/{matched}.spec.ts --project=desktop --workers=1`. If no frontend files changed, skip testing. Update .kiro/steering/uat-system.md only if tests were run.
